ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mining_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mining site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the mining site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the mining site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the mining site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the mining site */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Status of the mining site (active/inactive) */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of mining site (e.g., open-pit, underground) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mining_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mining operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the mining operation */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the operation is conducted */,
  "apostle_strength" REAL /* Strength of the apostle (a measure of the mining team's efficiency) */,
  "drill_strength" REAL /* Strength of the drill (a measure of the drilling equipment's efficiency) */,
  "lp_gold_ring" INTEGER /* LP (Labor Points) required for the gold ring */,
  "cost_of_gold" INTEGER /* Cost of gold in the operation */,
  "cost_of_ring" INTEGER /* Cost of the ring in the operation */,
  "yield_of_gold" REAL /* Yield of gold from the operation */,
  "daily_roi" REAL /* Daily return on investment (ROI) percentage */,
  "weekly_roi" REAL /* Weekly return on investment (ROI) percentage */,
  "yearly_roi" REAL /* Yearly return on investment (ROI) percentage */,
  "operation_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mining operation */,
  "operation_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mining operation */,
  "operation_status" TEXT /* Status of the mining operation (active/inactive) */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of mining operation (e.g., exploration, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mining_operations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mining_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mining team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the mining team */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the team operates */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members */,
  "team_experience" INTEGER /* Years of team experience */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Status of the mining team (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mining_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES team_leaders ("leader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mining_teams_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_leaders" (
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team leader */,
  "leader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team leader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team leader */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "leader_skills" TEXT /* Skills of the team leader */,
  "leader_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications of the team leader */,
  "leader_status" TEXT /* Status of the team leader (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drilling_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of drilling equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the drilling equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drilling equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the drilling equipment */,
  "drill_strength" REAL /* Strength of the drill (a measure of the drilling equipment's efficiency) */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the drilling equipment */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the drilling equipment (active/inactive) */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the drilling equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mining_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of mining equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the mining equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the mining equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the mining equipment */,
  "apostle_strength" REAL /* Strength of the apostle (a measure of the mining team's efficiency) */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the mining equipment */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the mining equipment (active/inactive) */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the mining equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment strategy */,
  "target_roi" REAL /* Target return on investment (ROI) percentage */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the investment strategy (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "strategy_status" TEXT /* Status of the investment strategy (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mining operation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the financial metric (e.g., ROI, cost, revenue) */,
  "metric_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial metric */,
  "metric_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES mining_operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mining operation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the financial metric (e.g., ROI, cost, revenue) */,
  "metric_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial metric */,
  "metric_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_metrics_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES mining_operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., mining engineer, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mining operation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the operation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  "access_actions" TEXT /* Actions performed during access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES mining_operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_strategies" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mining operation */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy */,
  "link_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the link */,
  "link_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_strategies_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_strategies_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES mining_operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_equipment" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mining operation */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mining or drilling equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., mining, drilling) */,
  "link_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the link */,
  "link_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_equipment_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES mining_operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES drilling_equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES mining_equipment ("equipment_id")
)
